NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_COUNTRY.description: Default country ISO code for store

NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL.description: Public site URL (used for canonical tags and redirects)

SPREE_API_URL.description: Backend Spree API URL (server-side only, not exposed to browser)

SPREE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Spree publishable API key for storefront operations

SENTRY_ORG.description: Sentry organization slug (required if SENTRY_DSN is set)

SENTRY_PROJECT.description: Sentry project slug (required if SENTRY_DSN is set)

SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Sentry authentication token (required if SENTRY_DSN is set)

SENTRY_SEND_DEFAULT_PII.description: Send PII to Sentry (only if you have user consent)

NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_SEND_DEFAULT_PII.description: Send PII to Sentry from client (only if you have user consent)

NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Stripe publishable key (optional, required for Stripe payments)
